message:
Command `PROJECT_PATH="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
DESIGN_NAME="mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
MCU_DIR="$PROJECT_PATH/$DESIGN_NAME"

echo "=== openlane directory ==="
find "$MCU_DIR/openlane" -not -path '*/\.*' | sort

echo ""
echo "=== gds directory ==="
ls -lh "$MCU_DIR/gds/"

echo ""
echo "=== lef directory ==="
ls -lh "$MCU_DIR/lef/"

echo ""
echo "=== def directory ==="
ls -lh "$MCU_DIR/def/"

echo ""
echo "=== verilog directory ==="
find "$MCU_DIR/verilog" -not -path '*/\.*' | sort` executed with exit code 0.
